evidence_summary: The scene focuses on the transition of Princess Dejah Thoris from captivity to safety aboard the Heliumite flagship. The visual narrative must contrast the physical toll of recent combat on John Carter with the celebratory atmosphere of the Heliumite crowd,...
John Carter transfers Princess Dejah Thoris to the Heliumite flagship. She is greeted with immense celebration, where she publicly credits Carter for her rescue, cementing his reputation.
